creator: loox@e-shell.net
text:
Version 1.8.9 still fails to start.

The ircdru bug is fixed... but still more errors.

# service anope start  
Starting anope.
chdir(${DESTDIR}/usr/local/share/anope): No such file or directory
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/anope: WARNING: failed to start anope

And there are spurious env vars in the binary file:

# strings /usr/local/libexec/anope/services | grep DIR 
${DESTDIR}/usr/local/libexec/anope/services
${DESTDIR}/usr/local/share/anope
${DESTDIR}/usr/local/share/anope/modules/
